description: Guitar triad fingering database: all 4 triad qualities, all 12 roots, close (adjacent strings) and open/spread (skip-string) voicings, all 3 inversions, frets 0-12, standard tuning EADGBe. Generated by Claude.

fields.root: Root note name (C, C#, D, Eb, E, F, F#, G, Ab, A, Bb, B)
fields.type: Triad quality: major | minor | augmented | diminished
fields.inversion: root (R in bass) | first (3rd in bass) | second (5th in bass)
fields.voicing_type: close (adjacent strings) | open (spread/drop-2, one string skipped)
fields.strings: Array of 3 objects [low→high], each with: guitar_string (1=high E .. 6=low E), fret (0=open), note (pitch-class name), degree (R|3|b3|5|b5|#5)
fields.frets: Shorthand [low, mid, high] fret numbers for quick scanning
fields.span: Fret span of non-open (fret>0) fingers — proxy for left-hand stretch
